cases.question: 目前数据库里一共有多少个客户？
cases.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS CUSTOMER_COUNT FROM KNA1

cases.question: 销售订单一共有多少张？
cases.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS 订单总数 FROM VBAK

cases.question: 查一下所有供应商的编号和名称
cases.sql: SELECT LIFNR, NAME1 FROM LFA1

cases.question: 查一下 2025 年的销售订单数量和总金额
cases.sql:
SELECT 
    COUNT(DISTINCT VBAK.VBELN) AS 订单数量,
    SUM(VBAK.NETWR) AS 总金额
FROM VBAK
WHERE VBAK.ERDAT >= '2025-01-01' 
  AND VBAK.ERDAT < '2026-01-01'

cases.question: 按物料类型统计每种类型的物料数量
cases.sql:
SELECT
  MARA.MTART AS 物料类型,
  COUNT(DISTINCT MARA.MATNR) AS 物料数量
FROM MARA
GROUP BY MARA.MTART
ORDER BY MARA.MTART

cases.question: 用 CNY 币种结算的销售订单一共多少张，总净额多少？
cases.sql:
SELECT 
    COUNT(DISTINCT V.VBELN) AS 订单数量,
    SUM(V.NETWR) AS 总净额
FROM VBAK V
WHERE V.WAERK = 'CNY'

cases.question: 销售额前 5 名的客户是谁，分别销售了多少钱？
cases.sql:
SELECT 
    KNA1.KUNNR,
    KNA1.NAME1,
    SUM(VBAK.NETWR) AS TOTAL_SALES
FROM VBAK
JOIN KNA1 ON VBAK.KUNNR = KNA1.KUNNR
GROUP BY KNA1.KUNNR, KNA1.NAME1
ORDER BY TOTAL_SALES DESC
LIMIT 5

cases.question: 采购金额最高的 3 个供应商及其名称
cases.sql:
SELECT 
    L.LIFNR,
    L.NAME1,
    SUM(E.NETPR * E.MENGE) AS TOTAL_AMOUNT
FROM EKKO H
JOIN EKPO E ON H.EBELN = E.EBELN
JOIN LFA1 L ON H.LIFNR = L.LIFNR
GROUP BY L.LIFNR, L.NAME1
ORDER BY TOTAL_AMOUNT DESC
LIMIT 3

cases.question: 今年（2026）每个月的销售订单数量分别是多少？
cases.sql:
SELECT 
    strftime('%Y-%m', ERDAT) AS 月份,
    COUNT(*) AS 订单数量
FROM VBAK
WHERE ERDAT >= '2026-01-01' AND ERDAT < '2027-01-01'
GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m', ERDAT)
ORDER BY 月份

cases.question: 销售数量最高的 5 个物料，列出物料编号、中文名称和销售总数量
cases.sql:
SELECT 
    VBAP.MATNR AS 物料编号,
    MAKT.MAKTX AS 中文名称,
    SUM(VBAP.KWMENG) AS 销售总数量
FROM VBAP
LEFT JOIN MAKT ON VBAP.MATNR = MAKT.MATNR AND MAKT.SPRAS = '1'
GROUP BY VBAP.MATNR, MAKT.MAKTX
ORDER BY 销售总数量 DESC
LIMIT 5

cases.question: 上个月（2026 年 4 月）销售净额最高的 5 个客户的名称、所在城市和销售总额
cases.sql:
SELECT 
    K.NAME1 AS 客户名称,
    K.ORT01 AS 所在城市,
    ROUND(SUM(VB.NETWR), 2) AS 销售总额
FROM VBAK V
JOIN KNA1 K ON V.KUNNR = K.KUNNR
WHERE V.ERDAT >= '2026-04-01' AND V.ERDAT < '2026-05-01'
GROUP BY K.KUNNR, K.NAME1, K.ORT01
ORDER BY 销售总额 DESC
LIMIT 5

cases.question: 查一下供应商 V010001 采购过哪些物料（要中文名称），以及每种物料采购了多少数量
cases.sql:
SELECT 
    EKPO.MATNR,
    MAKT.MAKTX AS 物料中文名称,
    SUM(EKPO.MENGE) AS 采购总数量
FROM EKPO
JOIN EKKO ON EKPO.EBELN = EKKO.EBELN
LEFT JOIN MAKT ON EKPO.MATNR = MAKT.MATNR AND MAKT.SPRAS = '1'
WHERE EKKO.LIFNR = 'V010001'
GROUP BY EKPO.MATNR, MAKT.MAKTX

cases.question: 今年销售额前 5 的客户，列出客户名称、订单数、总销售额和平均单笔金额
cases.sql:
SELECT 
    KNA1.NAME1 AS 客户名称,
    COUNT(DISTINCT VBAK.VBELN) AS 订单数,
    SUM(VBAK.NETWR) AS 总销售额,
    SUM(VBAK.NETWR) / COUNT(DISTINCT VBAK.VBELN) AS 平均单笔金额
FROM VBAK
JOIN KNA1 ON VBAK.KUNNR = KNA1.KUNNR
WHERE VBAK.ERDAT >= '2026-01-01' AND VBAK.ERDAT < '2027-01-01'
GROUP BY KNA1.KUNNR, KNA1.NAME1
ORDER BY 总销售额 DESC
LIMIT 5

cases.question: 2025 年公司代码 1000 的财务凭证里，借方总金额是多少？
cases.sql:
SELECT 
    SUM(BSEG.DMBTR) AS 借方总金额
FROM BSEG
JOIN BKPF ON BSEG.BUKRS = BKPF.BUKRS 
         AND BSEG.BELNR = BKPF.BELNR 
         AND BSEG.GJAHR = BKPF.GJAHR
WHERE BSEG.BUKRS = '1000'
  AND BKPF.BUDAT >= '2025-01-01'
  AND BKPF.BUDAT < '2026-01-01'
  AND BSEG.SHKZG = 'S'

cases.question: 对比 2025 年销售订单总额和采购订单总额，哪一边更高
cases.sql:
SELECT 
    'Sales' AS order_type,
    SUM(VBAK.NETWR) AS total_amount
FROM VBAK
WHERE VBAK.ERDAT BETWEEN '2025-01-01' AND '2025-12-31'
UNION ALL
SELECT 
    'Purchase' AS order_type,
    SUM(EKKO.NETWR) AS total_amount
FROM EKKO
WHERE EKKO.AEDAT BETWEEN '2025-01-01' AND '2025-12-31'

cases.question: 采购订单总额前 3 的供应商，列出供应商名称和金额
cases.sql:
SELECT LFA1.NAME1 AS 供应商名称, SUM(EKPO.NETPR * EKPO.MENGE) AS 采购总额
FROM EKPO
JOIN EKKO ON EKPO.EBELN = EKKO.EBELN
JOIN LFA1 ON EKKO.LIFNR = LFA1.LIFNR
GROUP BY LFA1.LIFNR, LFA1.NAME1
ORDER BY 采购总额 DESC
LIMIT 3

cases.question: 成品物料里毛重最大的前 5 种，给我物料编号、中文名称和毛重
cases.sql:
SELECT M.MATNR, T.MAKTX, M.BRGEW
FROM MARA M
JOIN MAKT T ON M.MATNR = T.MATNR AND T.SPRAS = '1'
WHERE M.MTART = 'FERT'
ORDER BY M.BRGEW DESC
LIMIT 5

cases.question: 财务凭证里凭证币种金额（原币）最大的 10 条记录，列出公司代码、凭证号、币种和金额
cases.sql:
SELECT B.BUKRS, B.BELNR, B.WAERS, B.WRBTR
FROM BSEG B
ORDER BY B.WRBTR DESC
LIMIT 10

cases.question: 行项目数最多的 5 张销售订单，列出订单号和行项目数
cases.sql:
SELECT 
  VBAK.VBELN AS 订单号,
  COUNT(VBAP.POSNR) AS 行项目数
FROM VBAK
JOIN VBAP ON VBAK.VBELN = VBAP.VBELN
GROUP BY VBAK.VBELN
ORDER BY 行项目数 DESC
LIMIT 5

cases.question: 查一下我们的大客户名单
cases.sql:
SELECT 
    KNA1.KUNNR AS 客户编号,
    KNA1.NAME1 AS 客户名称,
    KNA1.LAND1 AS 国家,
    KNA1.ORT01 AS 城市,
    KNA1.REGIO AS 省份,
    KNA1.STRAS AS 街道,
    KNA1.PSTLZ AS 邮编,
    KNA1.TELF1 AS 电话,
    KNA1.ERDAT AS 创建日期
FROM KNA1
WHERE KNA1.KUNNR IN (
    SELECT VBAK.KUNNR
    FROM VBAK
    GROUP BY VBAK.KUNNR
    HAVING SUM(VBAK.NETWR) >= 1000000
)
ORDER BY KNA1.NAME1

cases.question: 查一下哪些物料从来没被销售过
cases.sql:
SELECT
    M.MATNR AS 物料编号,
    M.MTART AS 物料类型,
    M.MATKL AS 物料组,
    COALESCE(T.MAKTX, '') AS 物料描述
FROM MARA M
LEFT JOIN MAKT T ON T.MATNR = M.MATNR AND T.SPRAS = '1'
WHERE M.MATNR NOT IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT MATNR
    FROM VBAP
    WHERE MATNR IS NOT NULL
)
ORDER BY M.MATNR

cases.question: 找出近两年没下过任何采购订单的僵尸供应商
cases.sql:
SELECT 
    LFA1.LIFNR,
    LFA1.NAME1,
    LFA1.LAND1,
    LFA1.ORT01,
    LFA1.ERDAT
FROM LFA1
WHERE LIFNR NOT IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT LIFNR
    FROM EKKO
    WHERE AEDAT >= '2024-05-20'
)
AND LIFNR NOT IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT LIFNR
    FROM EKKO
    WHERE AEDAT IS NULL
)

cases.question: 销售额排名在后 50% 的长尾客户有多少个
cases.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS long_tail_customer_count
FROM (
    SELECT KUNNR, SUM(NETWR) AS total_sales
    FROM VBAK
    WHERE ERDAT >= '2025-01-01' AND ERDAT < '2026-01-01'
    GROUP BY KUNNR
    HAVING SUM(NETWR) < (
        SELECT AVG(total_sales)
        FROM (
            SELECT SUM(NETWR) AS total_sales
            FROM VBAK
            WHERE ERDAT >= '2025-01-01' AND ERDAT < '2026-01-01'
            GROUP BY KUNNR
        )
    )
)

cases.question: 查一下有没有同名但客户编号不同的客户，可能是数据质量问题
cases.sql:
SELECT KNA1.NAME1, KNA1.KUNNR
FROM KNA1
WHERE KNA1.NAME1 IN (
    SELECT NAME1
    FROM KNA1
    GROUP BY NAME1
    HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT KUNNR) > 1
)
ORDER BY KNA1.NAME1, KNA1.KUNNR

cases.question: 对比 2026 年和 2025 年，销售额同比增长最高的前 5 个客户
cases.sql:
SELECT 
    K.KUNNR,
    K.NAME1,
    SUM(CASE WHEN V.ERDAT >= '2026-01-01' AND V.ERDAT < '2027-01-01' THEN V.NETWR ELSE 0 END) AS SALES_2026,
    SUM(CASE WHEN V.ERDAT >= '2025-01-01' AND V.ERDAT < '2026-01-01' THEN V.NETWR ELSE 0 END) AS SALES_2025,
    (SUM(CASE WHEN V.ERDAT >= '2026-01-01' AND V.ERDAT < '2027-01-01' THEN V.NETWR ELSE 0 END) - 
     SUM(CASE WHEN V.ERDAT >= '2025-01-01' AND V.ERDAT < '2026-01-01' THEN V.NETWR ELSE 0 END)) * 1.0 / 
     NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN V.ERDAT >= '2025-01-01' AND V.ERDAT < '2026-01-01' THEN V.NETWR ELSE 0 END), 0) AS GROWTH_RATE
FROM VBAK V
JOIN KNA1 K ON V.KUNNR = K.KUNNR
WHERE V.ERDAT >= '2025-01-01' AND V.ERDAT < '2027-01-01'
GROUP BY K.KUNNR, K.NAME1
HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN V.ERDAT >= '2025-01-01' AND V.ERDAT < '2026-01-01' THEN V.NETWR ELSE 0 END) > 0
ORDER BY GROWTH_RATE DESC
LIMIT 5

cases.question: 今年每月销售额的环比增长率
cases.sql:
SELECT 
    strftime('%Y-%m', VBAK.ERDAT) AS 月份,
    SUM(VBAK.NETWR) AS 月销售额,
    LAG(SUM(VBAK.NETWR)) OVER (ORDER BY strftime('%Y-%m', VBAK.ERDAT)) AS 上月销售额,
    CASE 
        WHEN LAG(SUM(VBAK.NETWR)) OVER (ORDER BY strftime('%Y-%m', VBAK.ERDAT)) IS NULL OR LAG(SUM(VBAK.NETWR)) OVER (ORDER BY strftime('%Y-%m', VBAK.ERDAT)) = 0 
        THEN NULL 
        ELSE (SUM(VBAK.NETWR) - LAG(SUM(VBAK.NETWR)) OVER (ORDER BY strftime('%Y-%m', VBAK.ERDAT))) / LAG(SUM(VBAK.NETWR)) OVER (ORDER BY strftime('%Y-%m', VBAK.ERDAT)) * 100 
    END AS 环比增长率
FROM VBAK
WHERE VBAK.ERDAT >= '2026-01-01' AND VBAK.ERDAT < '2027-01-01'
GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m', VBAK.ERDAT)
ORDER BY 月份

cases.question: 2025 和 2026 两年分别采购了多少种不同的物料
cases.sql:
SELECT 
    strftime('%Y', EKKO.AEDAT) AS YEAR,
    COUNT(DISTINCT EKPO.MATNR) AS DISTINCT_MATERIAL_COUNT
FROM EKKO
JOIN EKPO ON EKKO.EBELN = EKPO.EBELN
WHERE EKKO.AEDAT >= '2025-01-01'
  AND EKKO.AEDAT < '2027-01-01'
GROUP BY strftime('%Y', EKKO.AEDAT)
ORDER BY YEAR

cases.question: 对比 2026 年 Q1 和 2025 年 Q4 的销售订单数量
cases.sql:
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN VBAK.ERDAT >= '2026-01-01' AND VBAK.ERDAT < '2026-04-01' THEN '2026 Q1'
        WHEN VBAK.ERDAT >= '2025-10-01' AND VBAK.ERDAT < '2026-01-01' THEN '2025 Q4'
    END AS QUARTER,
    COUNT(DISTINCT VBAK.VBELN) AS ORDER_COUNT
FROM VBAK
WHERE VBAK.ERDAT >= '2025-10-01' AND VBAK.ERDAT < '2026-04-01'
GROUP BY QUARTER
ORDER BY QUARTER

cases.question: 物料 M000001 在 2024、2025、2026 三年的采购单价分别是多少（按年取平均）
cases.sql:
SELECT 
    STRFTIME('%Y', EKKO.AEDAT) AS YEAR,
    AVG(EKPO.NETPR) AS AVG_PRICE
FROM EKPO
JOIN EKKO ON EKPO.EBELN = EKKO.EBELN
WHERE EKPO.MATNR = 'M000001'
  AND EKKO.AEDAT >= '2024-01-01'
  AND EKKO.AEDAT < '2027-01-01'
GROUP BY STRFTIME('%Y', EKKO.AEDAT)
ORDER BY YEAR

cases.question: 销售额前 10 的客户，列出客户名称、所在城市和销售总额
cases.sql:
SELECT KNA1.NAME1, KNA1.ORT01, SUM(VBAK.NETWR) AS TOTAL_SALES
FROM VBAK
JOIN KNA1 ON VBAK.KUNNR = KNA1.KUNNR
GROUP BY KNA1.KUNNR, KNA1.NAME1, KNA1.ORT01
ORDER BY TOTAL_SALES DESC
LIMIT 10

cases.question: 每个供应商各采购了哪些物料类型，按供应商和物料类型分组统计采购数量
cases.sql:
SELECT 
    EKKO.LIFNR AS 供应商编号,
    MARA.MTART AS 物料类型,
    SUM(EKPO.MENGE) AS 采购数量
FROM EKPO
JOIN EKKO ON EKPO.EBELN = EKKO.EBELN
JOIN MARA ON EKPO.MATNR = MARA.MATNR
GROUP BY EKKO.LIFNR, MARA.MTART
ORDER BY EKKO.LIFNR, MARA.MTART

cases.question: 2025 年按物料类型分组，哪种物料类型的销售总额最高，列出物料类型和销售总额
cases.sql:
SELECT 
    MARA.MTART AS 物料类型,
    SUM(VBAP.NETWR) AS 销售总额
FROM VBAP
JOIN VBAK ON VBAP.VBELN = VBAK.VBELN
JOIN MARA ON VBAP.MATNR = MARA.MATNR
WHERE VBAK.ERDAT BETWEEN '2025-01-01' AND '2025-12-31'
GROUP BY MARA.MTART
ORDER BY 销售总额 DESC

cases.question: 在系统里建过档但 2026 年从没下过订单的客户有多少个
cases.sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT KNA1.KUNNR)
FROM KNA1
WHERE KNA1.KUNNR NOT IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT VBAK.KUNNR
    FROM VBAK
    WHERE VBAK.ERDAT >= '2026-01-01'
      AND VBAK.ERDAT < '2027-01-01'
)

cases.question: 既被销售过又被采购过的物料有多少种
cases.sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT V.MATNR) AS MATERIAL_COUNT
FROM VBAP V
INNER JOIN EKPO E ON V.MATNR = E.MATNR

cases.question: 2025 年的销售净额最高的前 5 个客户，列出客户名称和销售总额
cases.sql:
SELECT K.NAME1 AS 客户名称, SUM(VB.NETWR) AS 销售总额
FROM VBAK VB
JOIN KNA1 K ON VB.KUNNR = K.KUNNR
WHERE VB.ERDAT >= '2025-01-01' AND VB.ERDAT < '2026-01-01'
GROUP BY K.KUNNR, K.NAME1
ORDER BY 销售总额 DESC
LIMIT 5

cases.question: 销售订单的平均单笔金额是多少
cases.sql: SELECT AVG(NETWR) AS avg_order_amount FROM VBAK

cases.question: 采购订单里最常同时被一起采购的两种物料是哪两种
cases.sql:
WITH PO_MATERIALS AS (
    SELECT 
        E.EBELN,
        E.MATNR
    FROM EKPO E
    GROUP BY E.EBELN, E.MATNR
),
MATERIAL_PAIRS AS (
    SELECT 
        A.MATNR AS MAT1,
        B.MATNR AS MAT2,
        COUNT(*) AS PAIR_COUNT
    FROM PO_MATERIALS A
    JOIN PO_MATERIALS B 
        ON A.EBELN = B.EBELN 
        AND A.MATNR < B.MATNR
    GROUP BY A.MATNR, B.MATNR
)
SELECT 
    M1.MAKTX AS MAT1_DESC,
    M2.MAKTX AS MAT2_DESC,
    MP.PAIR_COUNT
FROM MATERIAL_PAIRS MP
LEFT JOIN MAKT M1 ON MP.MAT1 = M1.MATNR AND M1.SPRAS = '1'
LEFT JOIN MAKT M2 ON MP.MAT2 = M2.MATNR AND M2.SPRAS = '1'
ORDER BY MP.PAIR_COUNT DESC
LIMIT 1

cases.question: 财务凭证里有没有借贷不平衡的记录（每张凭证借方总额应等于贷方总额）
cases.sql:
SELECT 
    B.BUKRS,
    B.BELNR,
    B.GJAHR,
    SUM(CASE WHEN S.SHKZG = 'S' THEN S.DMBTR ELSE 0 END) AS DEBIT_TOTAL,
    SUM(CASE WHEN S.SHKZG = 'H' THEN S.DMBTR ELSE 0 END) AS CREDIT_TOTAL,
    ABS(SUM(CASE WHEN S.SHKZG = 'S' THEN S.DMBTR ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN S.SHKZG = 'H' THEN S.DMBTR ELSE 0 END)) AS DIFFERENCE
FROM BKPF B
JOIN BSEG S ON B.BUKRS = S.BUKRS AND B.BELNR = S.BELNR AND B.GJAHR = S.GJAHR
GROUP BY B.BUKRS, B.BELNR, B.GJAHR
HAVING ABS(SUM(CASE WHEN S.SHKZG = 'S' THEN S.DMBTR ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN S.SHKZG = 'H' THEN S.DMBTR ELSE 0 END)) > 0.01

cases.question: 销售订单抬头的净额和它所有行项目净额之和不一致的订单有哪些
cases.sql:
SELECT 
    VBAK.VBELN,
    VBAK.NETWR AS HEADER_NETWR,
    SUM(VBAP.NETWR) AS ITEMS_NETWR_SUM
FROM VBAK
JOIN VBAP ON VBAK.VBELN = VBAP.VBELN
GROUP BY VBAK.VBELN, VBAK.NETWR
HAVING ABS(VBAK.NETWR - SUM(VBAP.NETWR)) > 0.01

cases.question: 2026 年销售业绩最好的销售员前 5 名（排除测试账号 TEST 开头的）
cases.sql:
SELECT 
    VBAK.ERNAM AS 销售员,
    ROUND(SUM(VBAK.NETWR), 2) AS 总销售额
FROM VBAK
WHERE VBAK.ERDAT BETWEEN '2026-01-01' AND '2026-12-31'
  AND VBAK.ERNAM NOT LIKE 'TEST%'
GROUP BY VBAK.ERNAM
ORDER BY 总销售额 DESC
LIMIT 5
